response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but his profile does not match the mandatory requirements of this role. His C++ exposure is minimal and dated (a six-month stint at National Instruments in 2007-2008 and a university thesis project on Linux), far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. His database experience centers on MongoDB and MySQL rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and his financial exposure (RIDE Capital) was a Node/TypeScript investment platform, not capital markets or fixed-income systems. His depth is in web, TypeScript/Node.js, and DLang systems work, which this role does not need.
strengths: Long, consistent track record as a senior engineer with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic) shows performance-engineering aptitude
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and courses he created and delivered
concerns: No substantial or recent C++ experience, and none on the Windows platform as mandated
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; databases used are MongoDB and MySQL
No fixed-income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain knowledge; closest exposure is a Node.js fintech startup

key_factors.factor: No fixed-income or capital-markets domain expertise
Strong general engineering fundamentals and communication
